message:
feat: baseline seed canonical DB from best historical bundle via VACUUM INTO

When canonical DB is empty, find the largest healthy historical bundle
and bulk-copy via VACUUM INTO instead of row-by-row salvage. Handle
legacy schema v13 bundles by cleaning duplicate FTS sqlite_master
entries before vacuuming.

Additional improvements:
- Historical JSON passthrough: wrap extra_json in raw JSON sentinel
  to skip expensive serde_json round-trip during salvage
- franken_insert_message detects sentinel and writes raw string directly
- Lexical rebuild: fetch_messages_for_lexical_rebuild omits extra_json
  since Tantivy only needs core fields
- Batch flush logging with source row ID ranges
- quarantine_failed_seed_bundle for safe failure isolation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
